error_signature: Object Not Found : Something you're trying to use has been made inactive
title: QuickBooks Invoice Creation Error: Object Not Found
symptom: When attempting to create an invoice in QuickBooks, the error 'Object Not Found' is displayed, indicating that a referenced object is inactive.
not_this_if: All referenced customers and items are active
root_cause: The error occurs when the invoice creation process references a customer, item, or other entity that has been marked as inactive in QuickBooks. This can happen if the customer was deleted or deactivated, or if the item being referenced is not available.
fix_steps: Check the customer record in QuickBooks to ensure it is active.
In the Create Invoice node, use the correct Customer ID or DisplayName from the Get Many Customers node.
Ensure that an active item is referenced in the invoice line items.
agent_instruction: Verify that the customer and item references are active in QuickBooks before creating the invoice.
